sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62245" key="leioka/rhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειο-κάρηνος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n62245.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">smooth-headed, bald-headed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
